engagements.name: Fortune 500 VDP (Program A)
engagements.description: Vulnerability disclosure program targeting a Fortune 500 company's massive infrastructure. Deep recon across 35K+ subdomains led to critical credential exposure and unauthenticated API access findings.
highlights: CRITICAL: Live database credentials exposed via code repository
HIGH: Unauthenticated session CRUD on internal API
35K+ subdomains enumerated, 700+ live hosts probed
Threat model with 9 hypotheses — 2 confirmed with full PoC

engagements.name: Healthcare Retailer (Program B)
engagements.description: Bug bounty program for a healthcare retailer. Discovered exposed API documentation, source maps, registration bypass, UAT environment access, and hardcoded API credentials.
highlights: HIGH: Healthcare API documentation exposure with sensitive endpoints
MED: Registration CAPTCHA validation order bypass
MED: UAT environment publicly accessible
Best scope discipline — 0 out-of-scope reports

engagements.name: Fintech Trading Platform (Program C)
engagements.description: Bug bounty program for a fintech trading platform. 10 findings across authentication, OAuth misconfigurations, exposed test environments, and hardcoded credentials. Full recon complete: 300+ subdomains, 150+ live hosts. Three authenticated test sessions complete — IDOR surface ruled out, OAuth custom application attack chain confirmed with Tier 1 end-to-end evidence, and P1 evidence package further strengthened with redirect_uri bypass and header leak confirmation.
highlights: CRITICAL: OAuth custom application token exposure — Tier 1 end-to-end PoC, submission-ready
HIGH: Authentication token exposure via domain-scoped cookies
HIGH: Source maps exposing full application source code
IDOR patterns tested with dual-account setup — server-side access controls confirmed
3 authenticated sessions: 23+ hypotheses tested, P1 evidence strengthened with redirect_uri bypass and header leak
Recon: 300+ subdomains, staging environment, OAuth OIDC config, and legacy API docs discovered

engagements.name: Trading Platform (Program D)
engagements.description: Bug bounty program for a trading platform. Comprehensive recon with API spec extraction. 8 configuration findings documented. Closed — geo-restricted registration blocked authenticated testing; all viable surface-level findings recorded.
highlights: 3,000+ subdomains enumerated, API spec with 30+ REST endpoints
8 configuration findings documented across API and infrastructure surface
Threat model: 3 high-value surfaces identified for authenticated follow-up
Closed: geo-restricted registration blocked authenticated access — scope lesson

engagements.name: Food Delivery Platform (Program E)
engagements.description: Bug bounty program for a global food delivery platform. 11 reports across authentication bypass, subdomain takeover, staging environment exposure, and source map analysis. Identity provider authentication bypass has Tier 1 end-to-end PoC — submission pending. Recon refresh expanded attack surface with new identity provider and payment API surfaces.
highlights: HIGH: Identity provider authentication bypass — Tier 1 PoC, submission pending
HIGH: 35MB source maps exposing full partner platform code
Authentication bypass via test token on live production data
Subdomain takeover opportunity on third-party provider
Recon refresh: new identity provider surfaces and partner portals mapped

engagements.name: E-commerce Platform (Program F)
engagements.description: Bug bounty program for an e-commerce platform. 75% out-of-scope rate due to wildcard exclusion. Painful lesson in scope verification before testing.
highlights: 75% out-of-scope rate — worst performance across all programs
JWT leak found on excluded asset
Scope lesson: wildcard exclusions override individual asset matches
0 confirmed submissions — status uncertain

engagements.name: AI Platform (Program G)
engagements.description: Dual bug bounty program targeting a major AI platform's security and safety surfaces. Scope covers primary web app, REST API, and agentic product surfaces including browser and computer-use agents. Karpathy-style research loop deployed — systematic hypothesis generation, trial execution, and iteration. First finding validated: sandbox read boundary + safety bypass with Tier 1 end-to-end PoC. Attack coverage expanded to 8 prompt injection vectors across browser and agent surfaces.
highlights: HIGH: Sandbox read boundary + model safety bypass — Tier 1 PoC, HOLD pending reproducibility run
8-vector prompt injection framework built targeting browser/agent product surfaces
5-gate validation complete: 3 full pass, 2 conditional — evidence package strengthened
Focus areas: authentication, API security, and agent/browser behavior exploitation

engagements.name: E-Commerce Store (Consulting B)
engagements.description: Owner-authorized security assessment of a Shopify-based e-commerce store. Testing covered price manipulation, authentication, API security, JavaScript analysis, and infrastructure configuration.
highlights: MED: Missing DMARC enables domain spoofing and customer phishing risk
LOW: Weak HSTS configuration — missing includeSubDomains directive
LOW: Insufficient Content Security Policy — no script-src allowlist
Core controls verified: XSS, price manipulation, and auth bypass all blocked
Full remediation roadmap delivered — all issues fixable in under 1 hour

engagements.name: Software Startup (Consulting A)
engagements.description: Owner-authorized full-scope security audit for a software startup. Assessment covered web application, authentication systems, cloud backend, and infrastructure configuration across all assets.
highlights: MED: Open authentication registration — no invite/approval required
MED: Cloud configuration exposing app secrets via CDN bypass
MED: Missing email security controls (SPF/DKIM/DMARC absent)
Full audit report with remediation roadmap delivered to owner

engagements.name: OWASP Juice Shop
engagements.description: Comprehensive security assessment of OWASP Juice Shop — a deliberately vulnerable web application covering the OWASP Top 10 and beyond.
highlights: 26/110 challenges solved across all difficulty tiers
Full OWASP Top 10 coverage with reproducible PoCs
SQL injection, XSS, broken auth, access control bypasses
API abuse, SSRF, cryptographic failures identified
